ChromaCube Launcher

Settings

The launcher starts in the background and connects automatically. Closing the window keeps it running.

Enter your access code

Paste the personal code you were given to load your servers.

Sign-in required. A browser window should have opened. Open sign-in page
designed by @deforce_ for chromacube project. Change code

Update required

A newer version of the launcher is required before you can connect. Click update and the app will install it and restart by itself.
